title: fagraea graciliflora
intro: Fagraea graciliflora, also known as the white frangipani or white gardenia, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is prized for its beautiful white flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The medicinal properties of Fagraea graciliflora have been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Fagraea graciliflora is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
